expectations.text: Used the 🚚 emoji (the renames/moves alternate called out in the signal table), not the default ♻️.
expectations.evidence: No gitmoji used (Emoji: n/a); subject 'refactor: rename placeholder modules to descriptive names' has no 🚚.

expectations.text: Subject is imperative mood, capitalized, with no trailing period, and ≤72 chars.
expectations.evidence: Subject is NOT capitalized — lowercase 'rename'; the skill requires capitalizing the first word.

expectations.text: Did not repeat the type word at the start of the subject (subject does not begin with 'refactor').
expectations.evidence: Subject begins with 'rename', not the type word.

expectations.text: Committed the change on the non-main branch (chore/rename-modules); git log shows the new commit.
